title: Billionaire Gautam Adani and nephew agree to pay $18 million in SEC settlement over fraud allegations
summary_full: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani and his nephew Sagar Adani have agreed to settle a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit over allegations they misled investors.
summary_public: Indian billionaire Gautam Adani and his nephew Sagar Adani have agreed to settle a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission lawsuit over allegations they misled investors.
